---
title: "<i>Watchword, The</i>"
---

## <i>Watchword, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This periodical, the privately printed journal of the Society of Watchers and Workers, ran 1880-1972; the BL has only odd volumes, but there is an almost complete run in Lambeth Palace Library.  The BL\'s copies are bound with interesting rolls of members of the society;  CMY is listed as a member of the executive committee.  Christina Rossetti was also a member.  The <i>Watchword</i> was initially edited by the society’s founder [[person:749]Edith Jacob] (1836-1918).

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
